creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Author: tcberner

Log:
  Update Qt5 to 5.12.0

  http://blog.qt.io/blog/2018/12/06/qt-5-12-lts-released/

  - This breaks support for libressl again. Patches are welcome.

  Exp-run by:	antoine
